items.title: Slice along x with y held fixed
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  surface["z = f(x, y) surface"]
  slice["plane y = b"]
  curve["curve f(x, b)"]
  slope["slope = df/dx at x=a"]
  surface --> slice --> curve --> slope
items.caption: Fixing y = b cuts the surface to a curve in x; ∂f/∂x at (a, b) is the tangent slope of that slice.

items.title: From partials to gradient vector
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  fx["df/dx"]
  fy["df/dy"]
  grad["gradient vector"]
  descent["steepest descent direction"]
  fx --> grad
  fy --> grad
  grad --> descent
items.caption: Individual partial derivatives are the components of the gradient, which points uphill; optimization steps move opposite to it.
